objective: Implement a reusable, safe, verifiable Owner-Review agent orchestration layer in review-writer.
background: Replace ad hoc agent dispatch with one writable persistent Implementation Owner plus fresh read-only reviewers and verifier.
frozen_decisions: One workspace-write Implementation Owner per work package and worktree
Repairs resume the original Owner session unless replacement criteria are documented
Reviewers and Final Verifier are fresh and read-only
Default commands are offline preview or static validation
inputs: the attached frozen requirements supplied by the Leader
required_outputs: standard-library validated task and result contracts
acceptance_criteria: RED evidence is retained before implementation
safety_boundaries: Do not read credentials, tokens, cookies, sessions, private logs, PDFs, or Case 01 outputs
Do not commit, push, switch branches, reset, clean, install, publish, or deploy
Use subprocess argument arrays and validated paths; never shell-eval untrusted input
network_policy: Offline except the separately explicit /tmp codex dry-run authorized by --execute.
model_policy: Implementation Owner uses gpt-5.6-terra with medium reasoning; no fallback. Template remains configurable.
stop_conditions: A forbidden path would need modification
The single-writer invariant cannot be maintained
human_checkpoint: Report final PASS, PARTIAL, or FAIL; do not start Case 01 revision.
